creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 23/10/2011 10:07, Joe barbish wrote:
> The sysinstall procedure asks the user two different time if they want to install the ports collection. BDSinstall should at least make it mandidtory to purposesly click on the ports option to install them.

This is especially true since the ports collection that is installed 
isn't a portsnap snapshot, but looks like a snapshot from cvs instead, 
which is not what most users will want.

-- 
Bruce Cran
